known_limitations: RMSE higher than XGBoost despite temporal modeling
Score (610) better than XGBoost (914) — fewer late predictions
MC Dropout uncertainty is over-confident (coverage 0.56 vs target 0.90)
failure_modes: Val-Test generalization gap: val 13.58 vs test 20.11
recommended_conditions: When NASA Score optimization is priority over RMSE. Single operating condition.
not_recommended: When RMSE is primary metric (use XGBoost or TFT instead).
data_quality_required: Quality Gate PASS. Sequence length >= 30 cycles.
drift_sensitivity: Similar to XGBoost for feature-level drift. Temporal pattern disruption not separately quantified.
